title: A quick guide of mstknnclust package
text: Clustering common data mining task commonly used reveal structures hidden large data sets. clustering problem consists finding groups objects, objects group similar objects different groups dissimilar. Clustering algorithms can classified according different parameters. One particular type algorithms can distinguished graph-based clustering. graph-based clustering algorithms, data set can modeled graph. graph, node represents object data set, edge link pairs nodes. edge costs corresponds distance two nodes, calculated using chosen distance measure. One clustering algorithms within graph-based approach MST-kNN (Inostroza-Ponta 2008). uses two proximity graphs: minimum spanning tree (MST) k nearest neighbor (kNN). can model data highlight important relationships objects data. MST-kNN requires minimal user intervention due automatic selection number clusters. situation adequate scenarios structure data unknown. document gives quick guide mstknnclust package (version 0.3.1). corresponds implementation MST-kNN clustering algorithm. details see help(package="mstknnclust"). use R package forget include references provided citation("mstknnclust").

title: A quick guide of mstknnclust package
text: MST-kNN clustering algorithm based intersection edges two proximity graphs: MST kNN. intersection operation conserves edges two nodes reciprocal proximity graphs. first application algorithm, graph one connected components (cc) generated. MST-kNN algorithm recursively applied component number cc obtained one. algorithm requires distance matrix d input containing distance n objects. , next steps performed: Computes complete graph (CG) represents data, one node per object, one edge pair objects, cost edge equal distance objects obtained distance matrix d. Computes MST graph Prim’s algorithm (Prim 1957) using complete graph input. Computes kNN graph using complete graph input determining value k according : k=min{⌊ln(n)⌋;mink∣kNN graph connected}\begin{equation} k= \min \bigg\{ \lfloor \ln(n)\rfloor ; \min k \mid \text{kNN graph connected} \bigg\} \end{equation} Performs intersection edges MST kNN graphs. produce graph cc≥1cc\geq1 connected components Evaluates numbers connected components (cc) graph produced. cc=1cc=1 algorithm stops. cc>1cc>1, steps 1-4 recursively applied connected components graph. Finally, algorithm stops step 5 recursion, performs union graphs produced application MST-kNN algorithm recursion.

title: A quick guide of mstknnclust package
text: mstknnclust package requires igraph package work visualize graphs networks. package included mandatory dependency, users install mstknnclust package automatically. install mstknnclust package use install.packages("mstknnclust").

title: A quick guide of mstknnclust package
text: function mst.knn returns list elements: cnumber: numeric value representing number clusters solution. cluster: named vector integers 1:cnumber representing cluster object assigned. partition: partition matrix order cluster shown objects cluster assigned. csize: vector cardinality cluster solution. network: object class “igraph” network representing clustering solution.

title: A quick guide of mstknnclust package
text: clustering solutions can shown network clusters identified colors. perform visualization need R package igraph (Csardi Nepusz 2006).
code: library("igraph") ##  ## Attaching package: 'igraph' ## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': ##  ##     decompose, spectrum ## The following object is masked from 'package:base': ##  ##     union igraph::V(results$network)$label.cex <- seq(0.6,0.6,length.out=vcount(results$network))  plot(results$network, vertex.size=8,       vertex.color=igraph::clusters(results$network)$membership,       layout=igraph::layout.fruchterman.reingold(results$network, niter=10000),      main=paste("MST-kNN \n Clustering solution \n Number of clusters=",results$cnumber,sep="" )) ## Warning: `clusters()` was deprecated in igraph 2.0.0. ## ℹ Please use `components()` instead. ## This warning is displayed once per session. ## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was ## generated. ## Warning: `layout.fruchterman.reingold()` was deprecated in igraph 2.1.0. ## ℹ Please use `layout_with_fr()` instead. ## This warning is displayed once per session. ## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was ## generated.

title: MST-kNN Clustering Algorithm
text: mstknnclust implements MST-kNN clustering algorithm, determines number clusters automatically recursively intersecting Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) k-Nearest Neighbor (kNN) proximity graphs.

title: MST-kNN Clustering Algorithm
code: # From CRAN install.packages("mstknnclust")  # Development version from GitHub # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("jorgeklz/package-mstknnclust")

title: MST-kNN Clustering Algorithm
code: library(mstknnclust)  # Load the Indo-European languages dataset data("dslanguages")  # Run clustering (only a distance matrix is needed) results <- mst.knn(dslanguages)  # Results results$cnumber   # number of clusters results$partition # cluster assignments results$network   # igraph object  # Plot library(igraph) plot(results$network,      vertex.size  = 5,      vertex.color = components(results$network)$membership,      layout       = layout_with_fr(results$network, niter = 10000))

title: Performs the MST-kNN clustering algorithm — mst.knn
code: set.seed(1987) n <- 100; m <- 15 x <- matrix(runif(n * m, min = -5, max = 10), nrow = n, ncol = m) d <- base::as.matrix(stats::dist(x, method = "euclidean")) library("mstknnclust") results <- mst.knn(d) library("igraph") #>  #> Attaching package: ‘igraph’ #> The following objects are masked from ‘package:stats’: #>  #>     decompose, spectrum #> The following object is masked from ‘package:base’: #>  #>     union plot(results$network,      vertex.size  = 8,      vertex.color = igraph::components(results$network)$membership,      layout       = igraph::layout_with_fr(results$network, niter = 10000),      main         = paste("MST-kNN  |  clusters =", results$cnumber))

title: mstknnclust 1.0.0
text: First major release. kNN construction uses partial-sort approach stores floor(log(n)) neighbours per node, yielding O(n^2 log n) time O(n * log(n)) working memory. MST computed via igraph::mst() sparse edge list constructed integer index vectors. deprecated igraph function calls replaced modern equivalents (components(), intersection(), is_connected(), etc.). Package structure reorganised following R Packages (2e) conventions: one file per exported function, testthat test suite, pkgdown site. Computational performance benchmarks added (see inst/extdata/benchmark_performance.R). Added pkgdown website https://jorgeklz.github.io/package-mstknnclust/.
